files.notesZh: 串改猴匹配范围从所有 HTTPS 页面收窄到 TikTok Seller 页面；云同步改为按需启动，减少只用当前页打印时的启动卡顿。
files.notesEn: Reduced the Tampermonkey match scope from all HTTPS pages to TikTok Seller pages only; cloud sync now starts on demand to reduce startup lag when using current-page printing.

files.notesZh: 应用新版 50x30 标签布局：二维码 19mm，右侧订单号、标题、日期放大并整体下移压紧。
files.notesEn: Applied the new 50x30 label layout: 19mm QR code and larger, lower, tighter right-side order ID, title, and date.

files.notesZh: 放大 50x30 标签二维码到 18mm，并调整右侧订单号、标题、时间位置，避免压住二维码。
files.notesEn: Enlarged the 50x30 label QR code to 18mm and shifted the order ID, title, and time to avoid overlap.

files.notesZh: 当前页批量打印时，实际打印队列按 Title 排序；弹窗列表默认仍按订单时间显示。
files.notesEn: For current-page batch printing, the actual print queue now sorts by Title while the popup list still defaults to order time.

files.notesZh: 本地 Chrome 扩展安装修复：静态注入、文件标记保护、二维码 CSP 保护。
files.notesEn: Local Chrome extension install fix: static injection, file-marker guard, and QRCode CSP guard.

files.notesZh: 英文模式扩展到二级窗口、弹出菜单和复核/历史/打印窗口。
files.notesEn: Expanded English mode to secondary windows, pop-up menus, review, history, and current-page print dialogs.

files.notesZh: 修复 tk-printer 复核流水集合无权限时导致整批云同步失败；现在会先保存主订单最新复核状态。
files.notesEn: Fixed review cloud sync failing completely when the tk-printer review-log collection lacks permission; latest order review state is now saved first.

files.notesZh: 修复标题栏中英文下拉被窗口拖动逻辑拦截，语言切换点击后立即生效。
files.notesEn: Fixed the Chinese/English selector being intercepted by panel dragging; language changes now apply immediately.

files.notesZh: 版本下载中心改用 GitHub Raw 作为最新版来源，避开 Firebase 写入权限限制。
files.notesEn: Release center now uses GitHub Raw as the latest-version source, avoiding Firebase write-permission limits.

files.notesZh: 版本库改用订单云端兼容存储，便于旧电脑下载最新版。
files.notesEn: Moved release storage to the compatible cloud order collection so older computers can download the latest version.

files.notesZh: 新增中英文主菜单、版本下载中心、监听暂停原因提示。
files.notesEn: Added Chinese/English main menu, release download center, and visible listening pause reasons.

files.notesZh: 二维码改为本地生成，避免打印标签二维码空白。
files.notesEn: Generated QR codes locally to prevent blank QR codes on printed labels.

files.notesZh: 新增云端打印流水失败本机暂存与自动补写。
files.notesEn: Added local pending queue and automatic retry for failed cloud print-log writes.
